---
title: "Untitled"
format: 
  pdf:
    keep-tex: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
#| label: tbl-melanoma
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(boot)
library(dplyr)
library(magrittr)
library(tablet)
library(yamlet)
library(kableExtra)
#knitr::opts_knit$set(out.format = 'latex')
#knitr::is_latex_output()
melanoma %<>% redecorate('
time: [ Time, day ]
status: [ Patient Status, [ Died^1: 1, Alive^2: 2, Unrelated: 3 ]]
sex: [ Sex^3, [ Male: 1, Female^4: 0 ]]
age: [ Age, year ]
year: [ Year of Operation ]
ulcer: [ Ulceration, [ Present: 1, Absent: 0 ]]
thickness: [ Tumor Thickness, mm ]
')

tbl <- melanoma %>%
  select(-time, -year) %>%
  group_by(status, ulcer) %>%
  enscript %>%
  tablet(Missing~NULL)
tbl %>% io_tablet('tablet-melanoma.csv')
tab <- io_tablet('tablet-melanoma.csv')


tbl %>%
  as_kable(booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = 'scale_down')
tab %>%
  as_kable(booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = 'scale_down')

```
